thuisbezorgd.nl.text: They never deliver the order there is no easy way to refund or call them.

Ordered food and was advised in the app of a 30-40 minute wait time. Checked our phone after 40 minutes to see that the order was "Delivered", with missed messages from the courier to help get into our building as it was confusing to them(note: we live in a house, not an apartment, with our house number very visible). No effort was made to call us.  Tried to contact customer service and was - surprise surprise - greeted by an AI chatbot which did all it could to prevent me from speaking to an actual human. I selected the option that the order never arrived and was advised that we would receive an Email shortly. When I asked to speak to a person the chatbot told me that this was not possible.  Over ONE HOUR later we got an Email response advising us that Thuisbezorgd can see our food has arrived (it hadn't), and to contact them if this was not the case. We have sent an Email confirming that it has not arrived and are still awaiting a resolution and refund of our 60EUR order.  Of note - I am diabetic and had taken insulin in anticipation of my food arriving. Since it did not arrive I had to eat something so that my blood glucose did not go low.  EDIT: Thuisbezorgd gave me a refund and a discount code of 10%, as if I would ever use their terrible service again. The courier who didn't even deliver our food seems to have kept their tip, which wasn't refunded.

They consistently break EU consumer protection laws and actively refuse to offer any help if you are unsatisfied with the bare minimum that they offer you. If the food quality is bad (which is what happened in my situation) they offer a pity refund of €5.50 and refuse to even consider anything else no matter what you say. I have been in touch with 2 extremely inconsiderate employees - Nandigam and Thota P. The second one has refused to provide me with a solution for further investigation because according to her "it is not necessary". I will be looking into taking this matter higher because this is unacceptable behavior.

Extremely disappointing experience. The delivery time was initially set to 20:02, then pushed to 20:50 only after I requested an update, and the order finally arrived at 21:35. That’s over 1.5 hours delay. During this time, I tried contacting the restaurant multiple times with no answer. I also requested cancellation before delivery due to the excessive delay, but this was ignored. What’s even worse is the customer service. Instead of addressing the issue properly, I received generic responses and a complete refusal to refund, even though the service was clearly not delivered within a reasonable timeframe. This is not just about a delay, it’s about poor handling of the situation and lack of accountability. I will not be using this platform again.

Restaurants participating in offers with their own couriers are exploiting customers. Waited for 2 hours for an order that was supposed to come in 45 mins for it to not even be delivered . Spent 1 hour chatting with customer support and them assuring that the delivery is on its way and it’ll be delivered but the courier never showed up. The time to delivery kept changing , the courier even fake messaged that he’s here and disabled the chat immediately upon calling the restaurant and even mentioning the name of the courier driver they back out saying that talk to the app. Extremely frustrating and disappointing experience from Mima west and Thuisbezorgd.

Horrible experience, will never order from this app again. I ordered at 8PM and my order arrived at 10PM, cold food and soaked from the drink as it spilled, I ended up throwing all the food away and when I tried to contact the company I kept getting a bot. When I finally managed to speak to a representative on Facebook Messenger (the next day), they acknowledged the whole thing but only offered a small amount as a refund. Unacceptable from my side, would have appreciated a full-refund as I threw all the food away.
These people are so shit. This is an example of a useless company skimming off the hardworking person. They can’t even deliver a basic service that I would expect from a shanty town in South Africa

Update: after Roos sent me this message below, I still got the same response nothing was resolved. I now filled a formal complaint with the Dutch consumer authority and I would recommend those that have multiple complaints and evidence of no delivery and no solution with thuisbezorgd to do the same.  Ordered from McDonald's Almere Centrum through Thuisbezorgd. The courier never rang the doorbell, never called. I was home the entire time. Later I received an email saying nobody answered and that the order was left at the door. Unfortunately, nothing was there. Customer support refused a refund and closed the case without providing any delivery proof (call logs or photo of delivery).I even offered ringcam recording and call logs to show maybe the delivery guy got the wrong house, however they refused. I was left with nothing and loss of money. Very disappointing handling of the situation and unfortunately not the first time.

Are you kidding me? I paid 10 euros for a menu that is missing the burger and you are refunding me with 1,4?? So I paid 8,6 for fries and 2 pieces of chicken tenders?? Is this normal for you customer service employee named Akshara?

Thuisbezorgd lures customers into their app with promises of many coupons which give a hefty discount on meals. None of them work, ever. Voucher application terms are nowhere to be found on their website, so i contacted customer support, which was very difficult to find, I had to dig on google, and explained my situation kindly to maybe fix this issue. Now more than a month further i'm still waiting. Worthless support!  If you see any of their coupons used as as AD campaign, don't trust it, just go to competition with an actual support service.

The order was marked as delivered, but I never received it. I saw the courier arrive at my address, and a moment later the map disappeared and the order was marked as delivered. However, there was no food and nothing was left at my door.  I paid €30 only to end up still hungry before work and now I have to wait several days for a refund (if they even return the money). This is unacceptable service. Situations like this make it very hard to trust the platform, especially when couriers can mark orders as delivered without actually handing them over.  I hope consequences will be taken regarding the courier who marked the order as delivered while being at my address.

It's insane how clueless and utterly incapable the delivery drivers are. Out of the last 10 times I ordered something 8 times it went wrong. They don't speak dutch and their english is not on a level that they understand directions.
since you can't read reviews anymore its a messed up company. where possible I am gonna order food from the resto own website instead

Order never arrived, but marked as delivered. They claim that the delivery person ringed the bell, tried to reach me via chat and phone, but none of these happened. I also went to my front door immediately when the app notified that they left the order there, but there was nothing at all.  Customer service took 1,5 hours to reply, but just sent the a generic message that since they think it was delivered, they won't even issue a refund. I explained it again and again, and they had the audacity to just repeat the same canned message 3 times with just a slightly different wording. It's clear that this is internal policy, not just one support employee being unhelpful. DISGUSTING COMPANY!

Hello, My order is marked as delivered, but I did not receive anything. The restaurant was closed and no delivery arrived. Please refund the full amount to my original payment method.  Order number: G4R8GQ Date: 18 February Time: 04:23 Restaurant: The Burgery  Thank you.

I am a client for years from a restaurant that I trust, never had problems because they had ther own deluvery giys. Now they have to rely on thuisbezorgd delivery people which I have already made an ethical complaint. Yesterday I made an order, got a message of delivered, never was, I was going to call the restaurant and I got a message saying the order was cancelled, I called the restaurant, he was also confused so I decided to order again. This time I was tracking my order, I see the delivery man in a building 200 meters from mine sending me messages saying he was at my door, but somehow I could not answer, so he put the food back in his scooter and leaves and again the app say it was delivered. A few problems I have with this situation. First the delivery guys don't know how to read addresses, second they say they delivered something they never did, 3rd not even the restaurant knows they didn't delivered and what happened with the food this 2 times? Not just I lost the order from the 2 that day, my kids were waiting since 18:30 to 21:00, and I had to order from another platform. So I spent 3 times the money because of thuisbezorgd. Moreover there's no way for you to actually contact thuisbezorgd directly. You can talk to a chatbot and receive automated emails. I had to call 5 times the restaurant yesterday and today, because I don't want the restaurant to have problems because it's not their fault to solve this situation because thuisbezorgd if the restaurant didn't call them they would not have given my money back. Just so it is clear I made a formal ethics complaint. And I will also be filling a complaint in Autoriteit Consument & Markt (ACM). Not just because of the behaviour of the employees, the lack of clarity, the difficulty to enter in contact or make a complaint but also for the unnecessary problems they caused to a person that can't walk due to an accident and have a child that needs to eat. It is unacceptable the behaviour.
The food never arrived. Thuisbezorgd offers only AI generated chat and email. No support. No way to get the money back. Disgraceful.

Good afternoon, my opinion of this company in the Uden area is that it is a disgrace. Their customer service is the worst there is. They deliver orders late, they do not refund money immediately, and if you do not complain about the money, they do nothing and do not refund it. On the other hand, they make up excuses for refunding money. Such as vouchers, which can only be obtained after 24 hours, and the money is only refunded after a week. It's a disgrace. And on top of that, I've been waiting for the money for 3 or 4 weeks. It's all very unfortunate.
To be honest no so good. I was have bad experience and I will not work with them. But food was not bad. That's why 3 stars for this company.

ubereats.com.text: If I could give a negative 5, I would. The WORST platform ever. Thieves, con artists, straight criminals. Customer service non-existent. Can't can't cancel. Can't communicate. Tech is attrocious. They literally make it impossible to get a refund and cancel the order. Horrible people. Horrible platform. The worst. Stay away. Trade anywhere else besides here.
Customer service is awful. Close conversations without even helping you. Uber one membership doesn’t even work most of the time.

I ordered a McDonald's which I was told that it would be delivered by uber.. My mind set is that I made a contract with McDonald's and McDonald's made a contract uber.. The McDonald's meal was never delivered, and McDonald's said that uber should refund me the money... Uber say they filled their contract by saying it was delivered twice which it wasn't.. Order was placed at 5pm, first contact from uber was at 2am and the second was 4am the following morning.. I don't see this as forefilling their contract and the food was never left or handed to me This is totally unacceptable and I'm no nearer to receiving a refund

Why on goods green earth, would Uber think it's cool to put supermarket orders with fastfood orders? So now you pick up my freshly made food. Then send the driver to the grocery store??? My order is no longer hot or fresh by the time it arrives. 😐

1.5 hrs for a coffee And the live chat support call this a reasonable wait time. If I didnt live in london I might agree. Tried uber eats to see what the service was like and I am going straight back to deliveroo as they are unreliable

I live in apartment block set back from the sidewalk. On arrival my rider did not call or press my buzzer. I tried to call and messaged through the app but I had no response. They completed the delivery on their end and I received a photo of a ripped open bag in the middle of a sidewalk which is not outside my apartment block. I am disabled and can not walk without aid so i had to call a neighbour to help. We went downstairs and there was no groceries. I know uber won't help as this has happened before. They will say our rider made attempts to deliver it and not offer any kind of compensation. They only care about money. Not their customers. I would rather starve before I use them again.
The worst. I have spent thousands every year. No customer service. They simply do not care.

I had a really frustrating experience with Uber Eats. I placed an order and immediately realized I had accidentally sent it to my office 55 miles away. I canceled the order within seconds, but was still charged over $40 in cancellation fees.  When I contacted support, I was told there was nothing they could do because the restaurant had already started preparing the order. That didn’t seem right, so I called the restaurant directly and confirmed they had NOT started the order at all.  What made this worse was the support experience. The first agent disconnected the chat mid-conversation. The second agent repeated the same scripted response and didn’t actually look into the issue. When I brought up the fact that the restaurant hadn’t started the order to a third agent, they also disconnected the chat right after.  At no point was I rude or unprofessional, yet I was given the runaround and ultimately charged for food I never received. Between the misinformation and lack of accountability, this was incredibly disappointing.  Uber Eats clearly doesn’t value its customers when issues like this are handled so poorly.

Having procured some shopping via Uber from Waitrose two items were not delivered. These items were £20 each. When I flagged this within the app a refund for only one of the items was given and I was told that it was Uber policy not to refund the other items£20. This is outrageous that a company will not issue a refund for all items not delivered?!?! To say I am angry is an understatement! This policy they told me of is ridiculous and actually may even be criminal. It’s certainly ripe for suing them!

I had a horrific experience with this company. My grocery delivery arrived with over half the items missing, yet I am being charged for items I did not receive—including service fees for a delivery that was never completed. It is fundamentally wrong to charge a customer for products they did not receive and services that were not provided.  To make matters worse, the customer service is incompetent and dismissive. They rely on scripted responses rather than actual problem-solving and clearly don’t value customer retention. I am disgusted by the lack of ethics and the amount of time and energy I’ve had to waste fighting for a simple refund all while I'm sick. Avoid this service at all costs.
I just received my order and the whole bag and my food containers were covered in long white dog hair. Wth!
Someone picked up my order and it was never delivered. Noone has any record of joining picked up the order and I am still waiting to be reimbursed. I will never use UberEats again

I'd give no stars if possible. I ordered a delivery for my daughter to her London address. It said it'd been delivered, but it hadn't as they'd been watching out for it. No photo of Delivery, no code provided. The money came out of my bank and when I tried to dispute this, there was no way to contact them. I tried the online process but it needed an order number but it was showing no past or upcoming orders! I spent 2 frustrating hours trying to sort it without success.

Honestly, how is Uber Eats still in business?  Every single time I order, it’s the same story wildly overpriced food that shows up late, cold, and half the order is either missing or completely ruined. You pay a premium expecting convenience, and instead you get frustration. What’s the point of paying delivery fees, service fees, and inflated menu prices if the basic service can’t even be delivered properly?  It feels like there’s zero accountability. Missing items? Good luck getting a proper refund without jumping through hoops. Food arrives crushed, soggy, or stone cold? Too bad. And somehow this has become the norm, not the exception.  At this point, it’s not even worth the gamble. You’re better off picking it up yourself or ordering directly from the restaurant at least then you might actually get what you paid for.  Seriously, Uber Eats needs to do better. This isn’t convenience it’s a rip-off.
This app’s a total nightmare they drag their feet on delivery and ghost you if your order’s messed up, plus the food’s way too pricey

Forced to give a star while absolutely nothing shines bright for this company other than its lack of any worth whatsoever. They don't even offer a phone line to connect with their customers anymore. If you don't get your order, the best you'll ever see is a partial refund cuz they cannot take a hit for any cost, even if it means the customer pays for it and gets nothing in return but the frustration caused by this joke of a company. I will NEVER UBER anything ever again in my lifetime, or the afterlife, or beyond. Even if it means I go hungry or that I must walk 100+ miles.  NEVER! UBER! EVER! AGAIN!

I’ve been using Uber Eats for a long time, and I honestly never expected something like this to happen. I placed an order and somehow got charged twice without even realizing it. The moment I saw the duplicate charge, I canceled it immediately. I thought it would be a simple fix. Instead, Uber Eats told me they wouldn’t refund me because the restaurant had “already started cooking.”  What hurts the most is how little sense that excuse makes. If the food was really being prepared, then why didn’t Dave’s Famous Chicken send the extra order with the driver? I paid a total of $121 and all I received was two chicken sandwiches, fries, a tiny coleslaw, some chicken nuggets, and three sauces I had to pay extra for. That’s it. That’s all I got for $121. Meanwhile, they kept the money for a second order I never even received.  I’ve been a loyal customer, using Uber Eats all the time, and they couldn’t even help me with something this obvious. Instead, I was left feeling ignored, dismissed, and honestly ripped off. After this experience, I’m done. I will never use Uber Eats again. No customer deserves to be treated like this.

Can we discuss how a driver walked into my home, closed the door behind him & I didnt even know until I looked up... and you did nothing, not even refund the order he threw at me - when all of it is on camera in my building & on my floor where I live!! Or the driver who memorized my address & returned in different clothes & a hat, to yell at me about the rating I gave him? I go list more!

Customer service is horrible. Orders are constantly delivered to the wrong place because the GPS is horrible for the drivers. There is no way to communicate effectively with drivers whose first language is not English. So sick of having to go searching for orders and not being refunded. Easily lost $150 in total due to orders being delivered to the wrong address and being taken by someone else.

On 3/20/26 There was a discrepancy on “donuts” i ordered so i cancelled the order within 2 minutes. My card was charged $86.00 and I never received the goods. Uber eats REFUSED to refund me the donuts i never received. Spoke to the Merchant and they even agreed that Uber eats should refund me my money. Needless to say i will never use them again.

hellofresh.nl.text: The blueair 211i cleared the wildfire smoke from my house in an hour. Fairly priced and reliable
Wow and ehh... wow! I'm not a good chef at all, not even for an amateur. But: Fresh ingredients, lots of flavour, pretty fail-safe, and ehh ... wow! Love it!

I paused my membership but now a new box has been automatically ordered for me. I can't access my account to cancel it. The app and website don't link to my account. And the email link sends me to an account, but I can't manage or change anything on it. The food itself is good. But the portions are too small for me and my teenage son.

This company is a scam. I never received my order, but I was still charged for it. When I contacted customer service, I was told that my box had been donated to the food bank because the driver could not deliver it to me. I was never contacted about an issue with the delivery and never received an email with a tracking code or delivery information. When I asked for proof that my food had been donated, they were unable to provide it and never refunded me. Unfortunately, I will have to seek legal assistance with this, as the company is showing no interest in helping!
I’m very satisfied with hello fresh.

We are new to the Netherlands. Our house number is still being made. We left instructions to call as soon as they are here. Received our first delivery. Delivery driver was so rude. He had to wait 3 minutes and didn't even greet us. Just started berating me infront of other tenants for the solid 3min wait. Absolutely spoiled the experience. Not impressed!! Will not be ordering from them again.
Fish was without validity date and taste wasn't good

For the price per week I would expect better. The food is very bland, and some weird recipes - I mean who have 200g of white cabbage with chicken noodles, Asian noodles traditionally have lemon, peanuts and dried chillies. Every recipe the spices, the flavours are so boring and neutral. Also the size of the vegetables are a joke, an onion the size of a small potatoe, ginger tiny, always dried fried onions chilli sauce which just tastes of sugar, always harissa flavours. Get creative guys, stop stitching up your customers with over 100 euros a week, with cheap unwanted veggies from the supermarkets and start giving more flavoured food. Also fix your app, once delivery is done you can’t always see the recipes in English. Also show the real portions on the pictures for the meals you pick, they never match and always much much smaller

They send me a 3 different orders but I order one I send back the two extra delivery but they want to charge me anyway and send me to incaso company so when they can they will financial cheat you they don’t even contact me about this
The paper recepes in Dutch are no use to me. if you could send them in English...

Delivery came late with no prior notice. Recipes are not as satisfying as expected, though they mostly taste good. Recipes/cooking instructions could be clearer. App recommends meal regardless of allergies/preferences.

The food is good, everything simple and easy. But the delivery - it's not the way it should work: I live in the building with front and backdoor (in my profile it is mentioned) and the driver couldn't get into the building from the backdoor (there is no doorbell), phoned me - i didn't answer as was on another call but was able to open the door (he didn't use the doorbell in the front), and left. The option to reschedule the delivery for tomorrow (why not later today) - is not an option as I needed this box only today and in the morning. Hence my plans were ruined and I needed to change everything for the day.

Probably the worst customer service I’ve dealt with. They act as though they’re doing you a favour for providing the goods you paid for. They failed to delivered multiple deliveries, then just expect you to wait around all day the next day for a random time they decide to deliver it, when it’s really not hard to send a confirmation email that it will be delivered and to take a quick look at the delivery list to see roughly when it’ll be delivered. Really poor communication. Labelling ‘redelivery’ as an ‘extra mile’ and ‘goodwill’ when they didn’t bother to deliver it in the first place is pretty ridiculous. They will then take payment even if they don’t bother again. They need to seriously work on their customer service and remember they’re providing a service that they have to fulfil. They provide no confirmation of delivery, so on your end your left with no proof that it’s meant to happen other than screenshots and they claim they're ‘documenting’ and can’t send the email because it’s an ‘internal’ issue. If communication in a company is so bad that a customer service representative cannot send an email then there needs to be some real changes.

hello fresh is a company that leaves give you no choice but to accept a parcel that you don't want and they only give your reminder when it's too late for you to do anything about it and they contact page and help it is a stupid thing that don't understand what you're saying even though you're speaking in English or Dutch as I said it was the remainder was too late for me to even stop it and by the time I saw the reminder I couldn't cancel it who gets reminder at 3 o'clock in the morning and then take the money the same day

picnic.nl.text: Love Picnic! They are always very kind and you can give all your statiegeld. For us it’s the best outcome because we are both working and sometimes it’s difficult to fit groceries in the program. I’d rather spend time with my child! So thanks :)
Picnic is always on time. Good prices, good food. Very nice and polite personnel. Top!

I've been using it for years. It slowly started becoming less reliable to the point that now, they didn't deliver the groceries on 2 different occasions and they lie. I contacted support and they told me the delivery person was at my door and called the phone but no one answered. They completely changed the story when I pointed the lie because I have camera at the entrance and clearly saw no one was there. Avoid!!!!

I’ve been ordering groceries regularly from Picnic, and normally I’m very satisfied with the service and delivery tracking. That’s why this experience has been particularly disappointing.  My order was scheduled for Sunday at 4:30pm. The driver was shown as being five minutes away in the app, but the delivery never arrived and the tracking stopped updating. It is now Monday at 7:30pm and we still have not received the order.  We have called customer service five times. Each time we were given a new expected delivery time (including 11:00am today), but the order has still not been delivered. In many cases told we would get a call back, but did not. During our most recent call, we were told we would receive a callback within 30 minutes. Previously, we were told the same thing and did not receive a call back.  At this point, it almost feels like we’re pirates chasing a treasure that keeps moving on the map. The constantly changing delivery times and promises of callbacks have made it difficult to plan anything. We adjusted our schedule multiple times expecting the order or a call, and that time was ultimately wasted. It feels as though the impact on customers’ time is not being properly considered.  It is now set to be delivered tomorrow.  I did receive a €10 voucher as compensation, and while I appreciate the gesture, it does not feel proportionate to the inconvenience and uncertainty caused by this situation.  I understand that delays can happen, but the lack of reliable communication and follow-through has been disappointing. I hope this feedback encourages improvements in delivery accuracy and customer communication moving forward.
I adore picnic. Great products, great prices, friendly and competent delivery people.

I am an American who just worked for their production facility. It's disgusting. They don't supply hot water for employees to wash their hands', they leave spilt milk or yogurt on the floor of the facility. It's disgusting. The only thing they care about is their profit. Disgusting

Only one time in 1,5 years we could not open the door in 2 minutes, so the delivery guy just left. We called the customer service and they said it is normal because they have only 5 minutes in total for a customer. And... there was no possibility to deliver the groceries the following day or another day, so we had to pick it up. No excuses or compensation or whatever. The only thing they offered was a note to our profile that they should ring the doorbell a 2nd time too or knock on the window... Ridiculous. Not customer friendly at all!  8.12.2025 Answer to the reaction of picnic  We are already done with that 'service' emails... and the above written solution was the only offer you could make.... as I wrote... Oh man.

Advertising about a Loué chicken and what a great life this animal has, is not true. They only live for 84 days, so they are killed when to have only lived TEN WEEKS, just disgusting. And really horrible they are 10 weeks old and have the size of an adult chicken, how healthy can that be??
Refusing to redeliver order. Refusing to refund. Provided no communication from their side. I've been a regular customer for more than a year but this is the last time.

They have camera vidio everywhere almost in WC and check you 5 in 5 minutes and the sistem is very bad look like in jail and the food is wht you hv for freee is expire ans people are getting sick every day and than you get sick from food and take all of crazy things from there and if you call sick they say u are out . Very bad place to work .Het is een heel strenge werkplek en er hangen bijna op de toiletten camera's, je wordt gecontroleerd. Elke 5 minuten word je gedwongen om als een slaaf te werken tot je neus bloedt, het eten dat daar gratis is, is over de datum en ruikt vies. Als je daarvan eet, word je de volgende dag misselijk en als je niet komt werken, word je ontslagen. Er zijn daar heel vreemde mensen en het lijkt een heel slechte werkplek te zijn en ze dwingen je om elk weekend te werken. De mensen daar zijn ziek en het systeem van de plek is ziek. 🤮🤢 alot of people losing their job there just bcz they eat expirate food and they take bacteria . They dont care .next day u are out this happning with me and with more of my collevas they are not cheching the food and is happening to me allready 2 times with the food after this they fired me . Picnic is a sick place go there if u wanna get sick .

Used to be a great concept but has gotten terrible over the years and the customer service is even more terrible. They will put stuff on display but most of it will not be available when they deliver, the result? Finding out at 8PM that you have no dinner, not just once but almost each time you order. If you got the stuff on discount they will also not give you the difference back or give you the option to put it again in your cart which means that when they make a mistake you will pay for it especially if you’ve already ordered the stuff around the meal. Customer service gives 0 fs bc they know ppl will continue to buy anyways. Super snarky and definitely avoiding from now on (as someone who only used to buy groceries here).

They are coming late or not calling the door bell, just call the phone number. So when youre phone was on silent mode and you have been at home whole day, you are not getting you groceries and also your money back. You can go on the other side of the city to deliver it yourself. Customer service unfriendly and unhelpful, sending happy faces telling you, that you are not getting your money back.
Driver arrived earlier without notice, with the app showing the wrong time. Now company refuses to reschedule delivery and instead I have to move 1 and a half hours away to get my groceries.

In complete order Frozen foods missing, I was advised by driver two bags were missing from my order, be he didnt know the contents. I checked and tried to contact Picnic, i sent a text via their app at 12:30 did not get A response until 15:30. Chat line no answer. Finally managed to get someone on tel, who promised to investigate and call me back, i am still waiting for that call. My last 3 orders have had issues, either missing or damaged items, the costs were refunded, however I then had to goto a supermarket to purchase the missing items, which defeats the whole object.

deliveroo.co.uk.text: Order incorrect refused delivery and pin number ... driver marked as delivered and I was charged customer service refuse to assist help or refund

Absolutely diabolical customer service! Copy paste response after which they disconnected.  I was short 4 pizzas on a 23 pizzas order. I reported this to the last two riders that arrived with the partial order and they ignored me.  I contacted the online support and they refused to help stating I previously made claims without providing evidence after which they disconnected from the chat. This was my second order on the app, so the statement is false and offending.  I also contacted the phone support who repeated the same statement again and again - we have limited resource to resolve the issue over the phone, so please contact the online chat team.

I ordered some food but the wrong thing came and then went to customer support, i had sent multiple photos of what was wrong and they still decided to not approve the refund. at this rate even if a dead rat was in there, they couldn’t care less. Bad experience
I ordered 3 times a delivery and it never came to my adress and the say it was delivered .
It’s a great service! I get all my stuffs like foods and flowers from here hehe💕

Watch out. Check prices - not only do they charge a delivery fee, a service fee and a bag fee, they charge up to 100% more of the actual item (same item, same store) and don’t disclose this. Customer services are never helpful. WATCH OUT

As a new customer Deliveroo advertised 50% off first orders over £15 so I ordered KFC which came to £32 and I had a discount code to enter but there was no option to enter the code and I was charged the full £32 on payment. Obviously I started a chat with an agent who was very helpful and my order was cancelled. I have to wait a few days now to see if my money is returned.

They will deliver food with bonus spilled drink over it , imagine big mac with coffe taste oh and afterwads they will lose your time and dont refund your order anyway so basically money lost as well as time as well as your lunch break will actually take double ...

I am writing to formally raise a complaint regarding an order exceeding £60 placed via Deliveroo from Nando's, which was not delivered.  I was informed by your customer support team that the driver attempted to contact me. However, I have no record of any missed calls or contact attempts. Despite highlighting this, I was advised that I am not eligible for a refund or redelivery.  This is unacceptable. I paid in full for goods that were never received, and no verifiable evidence of delivery or attempted contact has been provided.  I subsequently attended the restaurant in person, where my order was replaced. I was also informed that similar issues with Deliveroo orders occur regularly, which raises further concern.  Under the Consumer Rights Act 2015, I am entitled to receive the goods I have paid for, or a full refund where delivery has not been completed.

Absolutely awful service, on Christmas Eve I ordered a wagamamas which didn’t arrive leaving us without food. Today I tried it again for a meal for my son’s birthday ordering a pizza express which was missing a family pasta and 2 starters. The refund was entirely inadequate and did not reflect what I had paid for the meal. Will not be using again.
Worst delivery service available, DO NOT GIVE THEM YOUR MONEY. They will NOT hold their drivers accountable for failed deliveries/stolen items/damaged goods. They won't put things right either.

Deliveroo driver put food on mat and took photo then rode off with the food. No refund after ‘investigation’ the photo is good enough apparently. My other half was sat in the bay window by the door and didn’t see the rider suggesting he was crouching when he did so … photo no longer available on app! Asked Deliveroo for reference number for my complaint but apparently ‘there isn’t one’! What a great scam … pretend to deliver why not there’s no comeback!!
Delivery drivers do laps around the town with your food and is frozen every time iv used them. Makes it inedible and they give you a pathetic amount of money back. Worst delivery app by far.

Delivery driver grabbed my hand, blew smoke on it and kissed it before I had any time to react. So far the company has asked me for video evidence and is not taking this assault seriously. They also said they could not guarantee that he would not be sent to my door again. He should be fired so that he doesn't go to ANYONE'S door again! The man is NOT SAFE! Do not buy from this company because they send dangerous men to your door and don't take you seriously nor fire them when you report them! What a disgusting way to treat anyone let alone a customer.

I ordered a pizza and four sides from Zizzi Brentwood through Deliveroo. When the food arrived, I found a hair in both the mozzarella and the courgettes. I contacted customer service straight away, sent photos, and explained the situation on the chat, but I was told there was nothing they could do.  As a result, the food ended up in the bin. This is the first time I’ve ever contacted customer service about an order, which makes the response even more disappointing. Honestly, I find this completely unacceptable. After this experience, I won’t be using Deliveroo again. Very poor customer service.
Horrendous company. Horrendous service.  Ordered something which never arrived. They didn’t come to my house or ring the bell. Then They refused to refund me

The company informed me that it could not compensate me for my order arriving improperly cooked and with half of it missing because I did not give enough supporting evidence. This has happened more than once to me, I have questioned what supporting evidence I can give for cold or improperly cooked food and missing items. Perhaps they'd like me to put a thermometer into my cold uncooked chips or take a picture of an empty counter top to show my missing items? Customer service were incredibly rude and unless I am given a resolution to this issue I will not be using them ever again as I cant run the risk of wasting more money on food which arrives in a poor state with no guarantee I'm going to get the support from the delivery service.

Can’t give a lower score, but would if possible. Ordered food and the app accepted the order and after an hour said it was being delivered. I waited a little longer then contacted the restaurant to see what was going on. They hadn’t had it come through their printer. Spoke to Deliveroo for nearly an hour and no empathy or sorry attitude was given for a mistake on their end. Embarrassing is an understatement
They are incompetent. Service as gotten worse and worse and no longer can be trusted to deliver food.

Ordered a £40 takeaway via Deliveroo that arrived cold and not of satisfactory quality. I was offered just £8.95 in refund, which doesn’t reflect the issue at all.  I explained that reheating isn’t the point — under UK consumer law, food should arrive in proper condition. Instead of addressing this, I was met with repeated “policy” responses.  When I asked to make a formal complaint or get an email address, I was told that wasn’t possible. I then asked for escalation or a written response — again refused. The agent claimed they were the highest level of escalation and then abruptly ended the conversation.  Very disappointing experience. Poor food quality is one thing, but refusing a proper complaints process or meaningful resolution is another. I won’t be using Deliveroo again.

thuisbezorgd.status: Requires localized proxy, extrapolated from UberEats
